name: Model Collapse: On Recursion, Noise, and Uncharted Machine Visions

description: arXiv:2607.09705v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Since 2023, computer scientists have warned against model collapse -- the contamination of training sets with AI-generated outputs that progressively degrade model performance. Exemplifying a positive-feedback-driven failure, it produces effects such as word repetition or pixel noise, ultimately leading to a loss of meaning and coherence -- at l...
author: Violaine Boutet de Monvel (LIRA, IRCAV)
